zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael Bauer於大約1530年出生在德國薩辛福格特藍德可萊斯多福時，他的父親Hannsen Bauers46歲，母親Barbara Hnerinn42歲。他於1568年與Lue在德國薩辛福格特藍德可萊斯多福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年1月9日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在薩辛可萊斯 洛騰波格維薩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael Bauer于大约1530年出生在德国薩辛福格特藍德可萊斯多福时，他的父亲Hannsen Bauers46岁，母亲Barbara Hnerinn42岁。他于1568年与Lue在德国薩辛福格特藍德可萊斯多福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1593年1月9日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在薩辛可萊斯 洛騰波格維薩。

nameMeanings.name: Bauer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Heinz, Manfred, Franz, Gerhard, Johannes, Wolfgang.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): status name for a peasant or nickname meaning ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, from Middle High German (ge)būr, Middle Low German būr, denoting an occupant of a būr, a small dwelling or building. This word later fell together with Middle High German būwære, an agent noun from Old High German būwan ‘to cultivate’, later also (at first in Low German dialects) ‘to build’. The precise meaning of the Jewish surname, which is of later formation, is unclear. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic status names or surnames.

variants.name: Agricola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Algert, Cornelis.  German Aloys, Otto.
German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of German   Bauer   and Dutch   Boer   ‘farmer’.

variants.name: Bauerlein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Gunther.
German (Bäuerlein): standardized diminutive of Bauer , originally occurring in southern dialects as Bäuerle (see Bauerle ), Beuerle , and Beyerle .

variants.name: Baur
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Uli, Ulrich, Alfons, Arno, Erwin, Friedrich, Fritz, Urs, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.
South German: variant of   Bauer   ‘peasant’ or ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Ankenbauer
meanings: South German (mainly Bavaria): from Middle High German anken ‘butter’ + būr ‘farmer’ (see Bauer ), hence an occupational name for a dairy farmer. Alternatively, the first element may be a topographic term, Anke, meaning ‘slight rise in the ground’, or an old term ank ‘watery’, hence ‘farmer with fields in a wet area’.

variants.name: Bierle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto.
South German: from a diminutive of Bauer , an unrounded form of Alemannic Bürle (compare Buehrle ).

variants.name: Beurer
meanings: South German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called Beuren, from Old High German būr ‘small dwelling’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Bauerle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernhard, Albrecht, Helmut, Horst, Lothar, Merwin, Otto.
South German (Bäuerle): from a Swabian diminutive of Bauer .

variants.name: Bauers
meanings: German: variant of Bauer , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or from a first part of an original compound name (e.g. Bauersfeld ).

variants.name: Beuerle
meanings: South German: diminutive of   Bauer  .

variants.name: Baumann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Otto, Gerhard, Ernst, Heinz, Guenter, Armin, Dieter, Erna, Friedrich.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): status name for a peasant or a nickname meaning ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, from Middle High German būman, German Baumann ‘peasant’ (see Bauer ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Poland, and some other European countries. Compare Bauman and Bowman .

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

en.lifeSummary: When Michael Bauer was born about 1530, in Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Saxony, Germany, his father, Hannsen Bauers, was 46 and his mother, Barbara Hnerinn, was 42. He married Lue in 1568, in Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 9 January 1593, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Wiesa, Rothenburg, Saxony.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael Bauer est né environ 1530, à Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Hannsen Bauers, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Barbara Hnerinn, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Lue en 1568, à Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1593, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Wiesa, Kreis Rothenburg, Sachsen.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael Bauer um 1530 in Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hannsen Bauers 46 und seine Mutter Barbara Hnerinn 42. Er hat 1568 in Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Deutschland Lue geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1593 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wiesa, Kreis Rothenburg, Sachsen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Bauer è nato il circa 1530 nel Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Hannsen Bauers, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Barbara Hnerinn, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Lue nel 1568, nel Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1593, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Wiesa, Kreis Rothenburg, Sachsen.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Bauerが約1530年にドイツサチセンボグトランドクレイスネウンドルフで生まれた時，父Hannsen Bauersは46歳，母Barbara Hnerinnは42歳であった。1568年にドイツサチセンボグトランドクレイスネウンドルフでLueと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年1月9日に故郷で64歳で死去し，サチセンクレイス ロスエンブルグウィエサにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael Bauer(이)가 대략 1530년 독일 작센 보크틀랜드크레이스 니우도르프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hannsen Bauers(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Barbara Hnerinn(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1568년 독일 작센 보크틀랜드크레이스 니우도르프에서 Lue(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 1월 9일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 작센 크레이스 로테버그 위사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael Bauer nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hannsen Bauers, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Hnerinn, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Lue em 1568, em Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1593, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Wiesa, Kreis Rothenburg, Sachsen.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael Bauer родился около 1530 г. в местности неундорф, фогтландкрис, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Hannsen Bauers было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Hnerinn, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Lue в 1568 г. в местности неундорф, фогтландкрис, сачсен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 января 1593 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности виеса, крис ротенбург, сачсен.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Michael Bauer nació aproximadamente 1530, en Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Hannsen Bauers, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Barbara Hnerinn, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Lue en 1568, en Neundorf, Vogtlandkreis, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1593, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Wiesa, Kreis Rothenburg, Sachsen.
